description: dkny watches are creative masterpieces with absolute durability. They have proven themselves to be experts in in the art of creating high quality timepieces, by combining the epitome of style with impeccable technology. The new range of watches are a fresh take on perfection and are great for urban wear. Case diameter: 32 mm Case thickness: 6 mm Dial shape: Round Warranty: 2 years Gold colour stainless steel case with a fixed bezel Genuine leather strap with a pearescent finish and a tang clasp for comfort and style White dial with gold colour numbers and hands Screw to reset time dkny branding on the dial Solid case back made of stainless steel for enhanced durability Water resistance up to 50 meters, allowing you to use it even when showering or bathing but not swimming or divingWarranty provided by Brand Owner / Manufacturer
